focus_points.label: What they're saying yes and no to lately
focus_points.reason: What they're prioritizing right now versus day-to-day firefighting, and whether the sequencing still matches team bets.

focus_points.label: Blockers and dependencies slowing delivery
focus_points.reason: Where work is getting stuck—decisions, other teams, or technical friction—and what you can unblock quickly.

focus_points.label: How their updates land with stakeholders
focus_points.reason: Whether stakeholders feel informed and decisions move forward smoothly based on how Test communicates in writing and meetings.

focus_points.label: What they'd want more of from you
focus_points.reason: How they experience your support right now—coaching, air cover, or time—and what would make the next two weeks easier.
